input.command: curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/spothq/cryptocurrency-icons/contents/128/color" | python3 -c "import sys, json; files = json.load(sys.stdin); icons = [f['name'].replace('.png', '').upper() for f in files if f['name'].endswith('.png')]; print('Total icons:', len(icons)); test_tokens = ['ALT', 'CODEX', 'BREV', 'GSTR', 'ETH', 'USDC']; print('\\nChecking your tokens:'); [print(f'{t}: {\"✓\" if t.lower() in [i.lower() for i in icons] else \"✗\"}') for t in test_tokens]"
input.description: Check if your tokens are available
